titleStmt.title: SII 28.248: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 248. (A.R. No. 403 of 1913.) ĀTTŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

p.note: In the body of the record, the following details of date are given-tritIyai, Friday, Rōhiṇi, Saubhāgya-yōgam. These details coupled with the date given at the opening of the record give the equivalent 1513 A.D., April 8, in the Julian Calendar. The month and tithi were Mēsha śu. 3. This date of the record falls within the reign-period of Kṛishṇadēvarāya.

summary.p: Records that Akki-Timmaya-nāyakkar granted to Aruṇagirināthar Śri Raṅgarāja-bhaṭṭar, belonging to Hārita-gōtram and Āśvalāyaṇa-sūtram, the village at Villavarāya-nattam, on the northern bank of river Nīvā in Āṟṟūr-nāḍu in Āṟṟūrkūṟṟam in Magadai-maṇḍala-Malāḍu alias Jananātha-vaḷanāḍu, giving the village, a new name Akkit-Timmaiyanāyakka-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, after the donor's name. The village granted was within the chirmai-bestowed on the donor on account of nāyakkattanam, by the king Kṛishṇarāyar. The village with all the types of land included in it, was granted to that brahmin with exemptions from all upādhis (encumberences/taxes). It was to be enjoyed by the donee hereditarily, as sarva-mānya with all rights and privilages. The grant was made on the bank of Chandrapushkariṇī in the august presence of Śrī-Raṅgarājar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu .
svastiśrī . śakābdam 1000 4 100 3 10 5 Itaṉmel cellā[ṉiṉṟa śrīmukavaruṣam cittirai mātam 10 3 śrīmā nāyaṅkācāryyan bhāṣaikkut tappuvanāyaṅkara
kaṇṭaṉ lokakkaṇṭa vañci nārāyaṇaṉ cāṭikkāṟar kaṇṭaṉ maṟaipukkār kāvalaṉ śrīmatu �ṉāci Akkittimmayanāyakkar yiṟaivaṉaraiyūr hāri[ tago]
trattu Āśvalāyana sūtrattu Aruṇagirinātar śrīraṅgarāja bhaṭṭaṟku tharmmaśāsana paṭṭayam kuṭuttapaṭi namakku svāmi kṛṣṇarāyar pālitta nāyakkattaṉa cīrmaiyāṉa makatai maṇṭala malāṭākiya jananā
tavaḷanāṭṭu Āṟṟūṟkūṟṟattu Āṟṟūr nāṭṭu nivā vāṟṟu vaṭakarai villavarāya nattam nancey puñcey nattam ceyt talaittiṭar māvaṭai maravaṭai kuḷavaṭai cāraṭai Eṟkaṭamai poṟkaṭamai taṟikkaṭamai vā
calmaṉai kācāyammantaivari cekkāya nakarikai Āya maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa palavupātiyu muḷppaṭa nāḷatu tṛtiyaiyum śukravāramum rohiṇi nakṣatramum saubhāgya yogamum peṟṟa Iṟṟai nāḷ śrīraṅgarāja sannitiyile candrapu
ṣkariṇi tīrtthakkaraiyile Inta villavarāyan nattattai nammuṭaiya perāle Akkittimmaiyanāyakka caturvvedimaṅkalameṉṟu Ivaṟku sahiraṇyodaga dhārā pūrvvamāka paṇṇikuṭuttom Inta Akkittimmayanāyakka
caturvvedimaṅkalattu catucīrmaikkuḷppaṭṭa niyi nikṣEpajalatarupāṣāṇaākāmi kopūmyādyaṣṭabhogatejasvāmya dhaṅgaḷum Uṭpaṭa dhārā pūrvvamāka paṇṇikuṭuttom Inta Akkittimmaya nāyakka ca
turvvedimaṅkalamivaṟku mivar varggittāṟkum dānādi vinimaya vikrayaṅgaḷukku yogyamāka Ācandrārkasthāyiyāka sarvvamānnyamāka dhārai vārttu kkuṭuttu nāṉkellaiyum kalveṭṭi nām kuṭuttom
Inda taṉmattai paripālaṉam paṇṇiṉavar keṅkai karaiyile Āyiraṅkoṭi kotānam paṇṇiṉa palattai peṟa kaṭaivarāka
vum §
Digital edition of SII 28.248 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
